# ShuttleBook

> ShuttleBook lets passengers view shuttle routes on a live map, request rides, and lets operators manage fleets, bookings, and passenger queues.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Browse shuttle routes on the map, search fleet vehicles, and book rides.
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create a passenger or operator account.

## Optional

- [Operator dashboard](/operator): Operator-only surface for managing routes, fleet, and bookings (requires sign-in).
